wikitext:
{{Event Header|StS2 Morphic Grove.png}} {{E|Morphic Grove|2}} is an {{2|Events|Event}} found exclusively in the {{2|Overgrowth}}. == Options == {{Frame|Group}} {{TS|negative||Lose ALL of your Gold.}} {{TS|positive||{{2|Transform}} 2 cards.}}
{{Frame|Loner}} {{TS|positive||Gain 5 Max HP.}} == Dialogue ==
You enter a grove of {{TS|green||crystalline trees}}, and they begin to {{TS||shake|quiver excitedly}}! A chorus of {{TS||up|hellos and welcomes}} bombard you as a group of {{TS|blue||Morphics}} {{TS||shake|burst}} forth from trees. One of the {{TS|blue||Morphics}} is fidgeting in the corner, clearly not as sociable as the others. Approach the group or the loner?
{{Frame|Group}}
You greet the chittering {{TS|blue||Morphics}} and they embrace you into their crystally arms. They share their combined knowledge and inject you with Morphic Magic, changing your nature... Such lovely creatures, these {{TS|blue||Morphics}}. {{TS|negative||One of them stole your {{TS|gold||gold}}.}}
{{Frame|Loner}}
You reach out a hand to the lone Morphic, sympathizing with its nature. It gifts you a tiny crystal fruit, and you consume it, as is custom. The fruit clarifies your mind and purpose. You give thanks, then make your way onwards.
[[Category:Events]] [[Category:Slay the Spire 2 Content]]
